The parent protein contains a maximum of 72 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

sh-Heptapeptide-8 SP is the single chain human peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Collagen Alpha-1 (XVI) and contains 7 amino acids consisting of alanine, glutamic acid, glutamine, glycine and lysine. Collagen Alpha-1 (XVI) chain contains a maximum of 1604 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Pichia r-sh-Polypeptide-1 Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of an extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of Pichia pastoris which contains sh-Polypeptide-1.
CI 77947 is classed chemically as an inorganic colour (see also INCI: Zinc Oxide). It conforms to the formula:
Boehmeria Japonica Branch/Leaf Extract is the extract of the branches and leaves of Boehmeria japonica.
Botryocladia Leptopoda Extract is the extract of the alga, Botryocladia leptopoda.
Potentilla Stolonifera Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Potentilla stolonifera.
Opuntia Streptacantha Seed Oil is the oil expressed from the seeds of Opuntia streptacantha.
Avenacosides is the saponin fraction isolated from the seeds of Avena sativa.
Rosa Damascena Callus Extracellular Vesicles are the extracellular vesicles released into and isolated from the growth media removed from cell cultures of the callus of Rosa damascena.
Hydrolyzed Queen Bee Extract is the hydrolysate of the extract of the queen bee, Bombus terrestris , derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
Tripeptide-79 is a synthetic peptide consisting of arginine, isoleucine and phenylalanine.

r-(sh-Polypeptide-119 Decapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes encoding for sh-Polypeptide-119 and Decapeptide-40. The fusion peptide contains 122 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Betula Platyphylla Japonica Leaf Water is the aqueous solution of the steam distillate obtained from the leaves of Betula platyphylla japonica. The accepted scientific name for Betula platyphylla japonica is Betula platyphylla var. japonica.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: PHELLODENDRON AMURENSE BARK/GARDENIA FLORIDA FRUIT/(COPTIS JAPONICA/DIOSCOREA JAPONICA/LICORICE/PAEONIA SUFFRUTICOSA/PUERARIA LOBATA/REHMANNIA CHINENSIS/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS ROOT) WATER
chemicalName: Phellodendron Amurense Bark/Gardenia Florida Fruit/(Coptis Japonica/Dioscorea Japonica/Licorice/Paeonia Suffruticosa/Pueraria Lobata/Rehmannia Chinensis/Scutellaria Baicalensis/Sophora Flavescens Root) Water
chemicalDescription: This is an aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the bark of Phellodendron amurense; the fruits of Gardenia florida; the roots of Coptis japonica, Dioscorea japonica, Glycyrrhiza uralensis, Paeonia suffruticosa, Pueraria lobata, Rehmannia chinensis, Scutellaria baicalensis, and Sophora flavescens.
inciName: PHELLODENDRON AMURENSE BARK/GARDENIA FLORIDA FRUIT/(COPTIS JAPONICA/DIOSCOREA JAPONICA/LICORICE/PAEONIA SUFFRUTICOSA/PUERARIA LOBATA/REHMANNIA CHINENSIS/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS ROOT) WATER

chemicalDescription: Cricket Oil is the oil derived from the cricket, Acheta domesticus.
Heptapeptide-54 is a synthetic peptide consisting of asparagine, glutamine, isoleucine, lysine, serine and valine.

Aster Spathulifolius Callus Extracellular Vesicles are the extracellular vesicles released into and isolated from the growth media removed from cell cultures of the callus of Aster spathulifolius grown in culture.
2-Hexyloxy-p-Phenylenediamine HCl is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:

sr-(Methionyl sh-Polypeptide-130 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from sh-Polypeptide-130, Dipeptide-19 and Hexapeptide-40 with the initiation code for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 175 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

Ovatodiolide is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Dinitroglyceryl Alprostadilate is a synthetic analogue of a prostaglandin. It conforms to the formula:

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: ASPERGILLUS/GYNOSTEMMA PENTAPHYLLUM LEAF FERMENT FILTRATE EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Aspergillus/Gynostemma Pentaphyllum Leaf Ferment Filtrate Extract is the extract of a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the leaves of Gynostemma pentaphyllum by the microorganism, Aspergillus.
inciName: ASPERGILLUS/GYNOSTEMMA PENTAPHYLLUM LEAF FERMENT FILTRATE EXTRACT

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: TRICHODERMA ATROVIRIDE/POTATO STARCH/WHEAT FLOUR FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Trichoderma Atroviride/Potato Starch/Wheat Flour Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of the the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of wheat flour and potato starch by the microorganism, Trichoderma atroviride.
inciName: TRICHODERMA ATROVIRIDE/POTATO STARCH/WHEAT FLOUR FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Oligopeptide-194 is the synthetic peptide containing 19 amino acids consisting of asparagine, aspartic acid, glutamic acid, glycine, histidine, isoleucine, leucine, lysine, phenylalanine, proline and serine.
Dendrobium Candidum Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of Dendrobium candidum. The accepted scientific name for Dendrobium candidum is Dendrobium moniliforme.
Centella Asiatica Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the leaves and stems of Centella asiatica.

Polyurethane-83 is a urethane polymer prepared by reacting poly(1,4-Butanediol)-15 and Bisphenol A Bis-(2-Hydroxypropyl) Ether with Toluene Diisocyanate. The resulting polymer is then capped with a mixture of HEMA and Hydroxypropyl Methacrylate.
Elaeagnus Macrophylla Leaf/Stem Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the leaves and stems of Elaeagnus macrophylla.
Artemisia Montana Leaf Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground leaves of Artemisia montana.
Crataegus Oxyacantha Leaf is the finely cut leaves of Crataegus oxyacantha.
Trichilia Emetica Seed Powder is the powder obtained from the dried, ground seeds of Trichilia emetica.
Schisandra Chinensis Seed Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the seeds of Schisandra chinensis.
Perenniporia Fraxinea Extract is the extract of the fungi, Perenniporia fraxinea.
D-Arginyl Tyrosinyl Ornithinyl Phenylalanine is the synthetic peptide consisting of D-arginine, tyrosine, ornithine and phenylalanine.
Bis-Vinyl Diphenyl Dimethicone/Lauryl Dimethicone Crosspolymer is Lauryl Dimethicone crosslinked with Bis-Vinyl Diphenyl Dimethicone.
Tranexamoyl sh-Pentapeptide-12 SP is the product obtained by the reaction of Tranexamic Acid and sh-Pentapeptide-12 SP.

sr-(Methionyl sh-Polypeptide-38 Dipeptide-19 Hexapeptide-40) is a single chain recombinant peptide produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the genes from sh-Polypeptide-38, Dipeptide-19 and Hexapeptide-40 with the initiation code for methionine. The fusion peptide contains 147 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Heptapeptide-52 is a synthetic peptide consisting of glycine, leucine, lysine, phenylalanine and valine.

sh-Heptapeptide-10 SP is the single chain human peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Angiopoietin-1 and contains 7 amino acids consisting of arginine, leucine, proline, serine and valine. Angiopoietin-1 contains a maximum of 498 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

chemicalName: Cyclohexanecarboxylic acid, 2,2,6-trimethyl-, ethyl ester (1R,6S)-rel-,Tetrahydro ethyl safranate,Thersarone
chemicalDescription: Ethyl Trimethylcyclohexane Carboxylate is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Dinoprostoyl Isopropylserinate is a synthetic analogue of a prostaglandin. It conforms to the formula:
Ascorbylmethylcarbonyl Pentapeptide-72 Tri-t-Butyl Tryptophanamide is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:

s-Water Bear Octapeptide-1 is a single chain peptide containing 8 amino acids. It is synthetically produced based on a sequence from Damage Suppressor Protein which is found in the water bear, Ramazzottius varieornatus. The parent protein contains a maximum of 445 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: SR-(CLOSTRIDIUM BOTULINUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-192 CLOSTRIDIUM BOTULINUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-192 OLIGOPEPTIDE-193)
chemicalDescription: sr-(Clostridium Botulinum Polypeptide-1 Oligopeptide-192 Clostridium Botulinum Polypeptide-1 Oligopeptide-192 Oligopeptide-193) is a single chain recombinant peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sr-Clostridium Botulinum Polypeptide-1, Oligopeptide-192 and Oligopeptide-193. The fusion peptide contains 507 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
inciName: SR-(CLOSTRIDIUM BOTULINUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-192 CLOSTRIDIUM BOTULINUM POLYPEPTIDE-1 OLIGOPEPTIDE-192 OLIGOPEPTIDE-193)

chemicalDescription: Oligopeptide-196 is the synthetic peptide containing 34 amino acids consisting of alanine, arginine, asparagine, aspartic acid, cysteine, glutamic acid, glycine, histidine, leucine, lysine, proline, serine, threonine, tyrosine and valine.

Aspergillus/Enterococcus Faecium/Pediococcus/Defatted Soybean/Glucose/Soybean Starch Ferment is the product obtained by the fermentation of defatted soybean, glucose and soybean starch by the microorganisms, Aspergillus, Enterococcus faecium, and Pediococcus.
